---
title: "Projects"
---

::: {.content}

## Educational {.section-heading}

::: {.card}
### PATOQ Book
A comprehensive Quarto-based online HTML book for the PATOQ project, providing curated resources for learning Bioinformatics, Data Science, and Machine Learning.

[View Project →](https://arashabadi.github.io/patoq/)
:::

::: {.card}
### Hackathon
CM4AI CodeFest 2025 hackathon project repository with code and project materials.

[View Repository →](https://github.com/arashabadi/cm4ai_codefest2025)
:::

::: {.card}
### Robot
An ongoing private project developing a 3D-printed plate reader for ELISPOT assays with a vision language model (VLM) counter. The project is planned to be published open source and made available online in the future.

**Status:** In progress<br>
**Availability:** Private now; planned open source release
:::

<button class="theme-toggle" type="button" onclick="toggleTheme()" aria-label="Switch theme">
  {{< fa sun >}}
  {{< fa moon >}}
</button>
:::
